mapper.sql: select id, site_id, category_id, is_ai_generated, prompt_template_id, generation_count, last_generation_id, is_top, is_recommend, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, publish_time, remark from gb_master_articles

select m.id, m.site_id, s.name as site_name, m.category_id, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon, CASE WHEN c.is_section = '1' THEN c.id ELSE c.parent_id END as section_id, CASE WHEN c.is_section = '1' THEN c.name ELSE pc.name END as section_name, m.is_ai_generated, m.prompt_template_id, m.generation_count, m.last_generation_id, m.is_top, m.is_recommend, m.sort_order, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.publish_time, m.remark, a.title as article_title, a.cover_url as article_cover_url, a.author as article_author, a.slug as article_slug, a.storage_config_id as article_storage_config_id, a.storage_url as article_storage_url, a.view_count as article_view_count, a.locale as article_locale, -- 关联的网站数量（仅对非个人站点配置计算，排除自己所属网站） CASE WHEN s.is_personal = '1' THEN NULL ELSE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_site_master_article_relations r WHERE r.master_article_id = m.id AND r.relation_type = 'include' AND r.site_id != m.site_id) END as related_sites_count, -- 排除的网站数量 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_site_master_article_relations r WHERE r.master_article_id = m.id AND r.relation_type = 'exclude') as excluded_sites_count from gb_master_articles m left join gb_categories c on m.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' left join gb_categories pc on c.parent_id = pc.id and pc.del_flag = '0' and pc.is_section = '1' left join gb_sites s on m.site_id = s.id left join gb_articles a on a.master_article_id = m.id and a.locale = COALESCE(s.default_locale, 'zh-CN') and a.del_flag = '0'

if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null

mapper.select: select count(*) from gb_articles where master_content_id = #{masterArticleId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_master_articles
site_id, category_id, is_ai_generated, prompt_template_id, generation_count, last_generation_id, is_top, is_recommend, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, publish_time, remark,
#{siteId}, #{categoryId}, #{isAiGenerated}, #{promptTemplateId}, #{generationCount}, #{lastGenerationId}, #{isTop}, #{isRecommend}, #{sortOrder}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{publishTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete: update gb_master_articles set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_master_articles set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
